justification.what: Vultr VM vc2-2c-4gb ($24/mo) for idea-nexus deployment
justification.why: Hosts Qdrant + Honcho + MCP server + embedding model for master memory solution
justification.how_helps: Enables centralized knowledge graph, cross-session memory, drift detection for all agent types
justification.expected_return: Foundation infrastructure — reduces context waste, enables self-improving multi-agent memory
